calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Verleana D. Green for petitioner and proposed executor Dwayne D. Johnson (via Zoom).
Robert Cowan for beneficiary Sharon Johnson.

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary.

Ms. Green stated that the decedent executed a will in 2004 and that no subsequent will was created, but the original could not be located after death. She stated there was no evidence that the decedent destroyed the will or intended to revoke it.

The Court stated it had reviewed the filings and indicated its intent to grant the petition. Finding no objections, the Court admitted the lost will dated April 1, 2004, to probate and appointed Dwayne D. Johnson as executor with full IAEA authority. Bond was waived. Frank Mahoney III was appointed probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing on close of estate for October 4, 2027, and indicated that if a petition for final distribution or status report is filed two weeks prior, the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
